summary: Expanded Design Choices section in 06-notes.typ from ~75 to ~245 lines with six comprehensive subsections: updated semantic definitions, algebraic classification (interior operators), expressive power and frame definability, representation theorem challenges, historical context (Prior through TM project), and design rationale. All content integrates team research findings.

completion_data.completion_summary: Expanded Design Choices section from ~75 to ~245 lines covering algebraic classification (interior operators, McKinsey-Tarski, Jonsson-Tarski), expressive power (frame class collapse), representation theorem challenges (canonical model differences), historical context (Prior to TM project), and design rationale for reflexive semantics.
